objective: Freeze the binding Phase 0 Ubiquitous Language as a canonical glossary covering all twelve bounded-context names and Phase 0 seed terms, resolvable by the DDD MUST validator, and resolving the four naming hotspots deferred from issue #16.
invariants: Each term has one context-owned binding definition.
A new domain term requires a glossary change before merge.
Numeric-only context names are excluded from daily work; the twelve full names are binding.
No runtime RiskLevel is inferred from GitHub Project Risk.
Ratification is R1 human-required; no agent may infer, manufacture, or replay the product-owner decision.
decisions: Product owner chose spec worktree (option A): spec/ubiquitous-language + feature/2-freeze-glossary at .worktrees/spec-ubiquitous-language, because #2 produces a permanent test and worktree policy assigns code to code worktrees.
Product owner chose glossary path (option A): my-docs/okf/glossary.md as a new OKF artifact type alongside concepts, handoffs, and event-storming.
Product owner chose scope (option A): seed terms from plan §3.2 + 12 bounded-context names + the 4 naming hotspots deferred from #16.
EvaluationArtifactSnapshot is the canonical Phase 0 name for the Tool Lab -> Knowledge evaluation-artifact contract (resolves deferred hotspot #2).
ConversionArtifact is the canonical Phase 0 name for the MarkItDown ToolVersion -> Knowledge document-conversion contract (resolves deferred hotspot #2 conversion variant).
IndexState canonical names are current, pending, degraded (resolves deferred hotspot #5).

Provenance minimum schema is binding at Phase 0: source identity, acquisition time, content digest, ToolVersion identity, EvaluationRun identity or conversion time, transcript source/confidence where applicable, and Execution/Trace references.

Meaningfully changed Phase 0 binding: any curated Concept content-hash change beyond exact equality triggers Supersession; a narrower semantic threshold may be refined in tactical design but cannot weaken this default.

Terms out of scope for v1 and owned by issue #3 or later tactical design: runtime RiskLevel assignment policy; direct Published Language vs Integration ACL route; OKF/Git partial-failure recovery protocol.

Tool vs Skill boundary is closed by this glossary: both ToolVersion and SkillVersion are binding and distinct; a repository packages itself as a skill but an executable pipeline is evaluated as a ToolVersion candidate.
implementation_state: Glossary v1 drafted at my-docs/okf/glossary.md with status Review. It defines 12 bounded contexts, ~40 seed terms from plan §3.2, and resolves the 4 naming hotspots deferred from issue #16 (EvaluationArtifactSnapshot, ConversionArtifact, IndexState names, minimum provenance schema, meaningfully-changed threshold). A DDD validator test will assert the canonical glossary is referenced. The record is on branch feature/2-freeze-glossary in the spec-ubiquitous-language worktree, uncommitted pending product-owner ratification. No code changed yet. Parent context-map conclusion (#16) deferred-hotspot ownership is partially discharged: hotspots #2-#5 are resolved here; hotspots #1, #6, #7 remain owned by issue #3.

verification.result: PASS: 4 schema, 4 policy, 4 template, 2 resolved review (to be re-run in worktree after test addition)

open_loops: Product-owner ratification of my-docs/okf/glossary.md is pending (R1 HITL).
DDD MUST validator test referencing the canonical glossary must be added before claiming exit criterion #2 is met.
Deferred hotspot ownership for #1 (runtime RiskLevel), #6 (direct vs ACL route), and #7 (OKF/Git recovery) remains with issue #3.
Glossary v1 is Phase-0-bound; Phase 1 terms (e.g. concrete Workflow node types, connector contracts) are added via glossary change before their merge.
next_action: Add the DDD MUST validator test referencing my-docs/okf/glossary.md, run repo verification in the worktree, commit on feature/2-freeze-glossary, then present my-docs/okf/glossary.md to the product owner for explicit R1 ratification through the HITL Review Inbox.
pending_hitl: Ratify Glossary v1 at my-docs/okf/glossary.md: confirm the 12 bounded-context names, the ~40 seed terms, and the 4 deferred-hotspot resolutions (EvaluationArtifactSnapshot, ConversionArtifact, IndexState names, minimum provenance schema, meaningfully-changed threshold). R1 human-required; issue #2 status Review until ratified.
